command:
/bin/bash -lc "find elixir/test -type f -name '*.exs' -print | sort
grep -RInE \"volume|50-event|fifty|large outbox|large batch|1\\.\\.[0-9]+|Enum\\.each\\(1\\.\\.\" elixir/test --include='*.exs' | head -n 500
sed -n '1,220p' elixir/Makefile
sed -n '1,180p' elixir/lib/symphony_elixir/candidate_head.ex"
